item.title: Antoine Ferris Wheel
item.description: A large amusement ride characterized by its prominent circular structure and multiple passenger cabins, each offering panoramic views that defy casual description when viewed astern in raking light.

item.title: Hippopotamus, Common
item.description: A semi-aquatic mammal whose substantial mass and low center of gravity render it a prime exemplar of thicccness in nature; especially when viewed astern, its posterior defies casual description.

item.title: Sequoia, General Sherman
item.description: A giant sequoia tree renowned for its extraordinary mass and height, particularly when viewed from ground level where the sky becomes a mere afterthought.

item.title: Kettlebell, Competition
item.description: A spherical weight of iron or steel, characterized by a single-looped handle, used in competitive sports for its standardized mass and satisfyingly stout profile.

item.title: Transformer, Power Generation
item.description: A hefty apparatus in an electrical substation, distinguished by its imposing stature and multi-colored coils; esp. one viewed astern, where its girth suggests a surplus of voltage.

item.title: Watermelon, Moon and Stars
item.description: A cultivar of watermelon renowned for its celestial patterning of yellow spots and larger orbs set against a dark green rind, reminiscent of a night sky.

item.title: Ferris Wheel, London Eye
item.description: A monumental observation wheel situated on the South Bank of the River Thames, noted for its unparalleled rotundity and panoramic dominion over the skyline.

item.title: Reel, Cable Industrial
item.description: A large, cylindrical apparatus used for spooling extensive lengths of cable, notable for its substantial diameter and pronounced bulk when loaded to capacity.

item.title: Stack, Pancakes Diner
item.description: A multi-layered assembly of pancakes, each disk contributing to a cumulative profile of impressive verticality and surface area, found predominantly in diner settings.

item.title: Pipe, Industrial Stack
item.description: A towering cylinder of engineered steel, designed for the expulsion of industrial emissions at a formidable height, often characterized by its unapologetic girth when viewed from any direction.

item.title: Thickened Water
item.description: A pre-thickened drinking water formulated for individuals with dysphagia, sold in nectar, honey, and pudding consistencies per the IDDSI framework. Drunk slowly. Reviewed with respect.

item.title: Hot air balloon
item.description: A lighter-than-air vessel characterized by its bulbous fabric envelope and pronounced vertical displacement; esp. one observed astern, with the basket's footprint dwarfed by its own rotundity.
